sentence: Although we may disagree with it, we must nevertheless _______ the sentence handed down by the court-martial.
We _______ the measure of the administration, for it is an excellent decision.
definition: To sanction officially; to ratify; to confirm; to set as satisfactory.
To regard as good; to commend; to be pleased with; to think well of.
To make proof of; to demonstrate; to prove or show practically.
